summary: Issue #426 analytics-backed aggregates: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. All 4 ACs mapped to contract tests (29/29 pass). Null policy verified — analytics KPI fields None when partition missing, no zero fabrication. No CRITICAL reliability/security/observability/performance gaps in aggregates layer. Non-blocking Feature Envy smell and convention notes imported. analytics_spend_denominator stays None until promotion spend ETL — expected out-of-scope product limitation.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): builder re-reads analytics_revenue_denominator from computed_kpis to populate ShopProfileSignals.ad_revenue_total.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Optional follow-up: expose ad_revenue_total from compute_all_kpis or a profile-signals helper to keep builder thin.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Single-field bridge for shop profile classifier; behavior tested; acceptable for P2-A3 slice.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: module docstring still says commerce-only while MODULE.md documents analytics sources.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Align builder.py module docstring with MODULE.md on next touch.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: test_builder_module_imports_only_commerce_repos name no longer reflects analytics repo imports.
Product/reliability note: analytics_spend_denominator always None — promotion spend not yet persisted by ETL; ROAS/CAC efficiency KPIs remain unavailable in scoring signals.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Wire spend denominator when promotion activity ETL persistence lands (future slice); null policy correct until then.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Explicitly out of scope per issue MODULE.md and Executor assumption; revenue denominator join tested; no zero fabrication.

interfaceChanges.description: Added analytics KPI fields: shop_traffic_conversion_rate, analytics_*_gmv_30d, analytics_weighted_product_ctr, promotion_activity_partition_present, analytics_revenue_denominator, analytics_spend_denominator.
Reads AnalyticsPerformanceRepo + TikTokSyncStateRepo; extends data_sources with analytics tables.
Pure analytics grain rollups from ETL intervals with null policy.

mappings.criterion: build_feature_aggregates reads new Postgres sources; data_sources list updated
analytics product gmv and ctr rollups formulas documented inline; no trained ML features in phase2 aggregates paths
Contract tests extend test_feature_aggregates_contract analytics backed aggregates
Null policy when analytics partition missing (no zero-fabrication)

recommendations: Align builder.py module docstring with MODULE.md analytics sources.
Rename commerce-only import test when convenient.
Wire analytics_spend_denominator when promotion spend ETL persistence lands.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; all ACs mapped; 29/29 contract tests pass. Accepted ship-as-is for spend denominator null (out-of-scope ETL) and non-blocking Feature Envy smell.

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged WARNING findings; null policy and analytics source reads verified by contract tests.

reviewBasis: working tree vs HEAD 8524a37b0c386717aa92a102a87d1324853ec8cf on feature/issue-425-analytics-etl-normalizers (#426 uncommitted)
